expectations.text: generate-form-hook: generate.mjs hook useLoginForm 실행 결과로 생성된 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: Summary states coding-rules scripts do not exist (init-try not run). useLoginForm was implemented manually, not via generate.mjs.

expectations.text: generate-api-hook: generate.mjs api-hook useLogin 실행 결과로 생성된 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: Summary states coding-rules scripts do not exist. useLogin was implemented manually, not via generate.mjs.

expectations.text: login-hook-in-mutations: useLogin 훅이 apis/mutations/ 경로 하위에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: useLogin is at features/next-app/hooks/apis/useLogin.ts, which is under apis/ but NOT under apis/mutations/. It is directly in the apis/ directory.
useLoginForm is at features/next-app/hooks/login/useLoginForm.ts, which is under hooks/.

expectations.text: page-imports-hooks: 로그인 페이지 파일이 useLoginForm과 useLogin을 import한다
expectations.evidence: app/login/page.tsx imports useLoginForm from '@/hooks/login/useLoginForm' (line 4) and useLogin from '@/hooks/apis/useLogin' (line 5).

expectations.text: page-no-direct-logic: 로그인 페이지 컴포넌트에 직접적인 useState/fetch 로직이 없고 훅 조합만 한다
expectations.evidence: app/login/page.tsx has no useState, useEffect, or fetch calls. It only uses useLoginForm() and useLogin() hooks, with a handleSubmit function that delegates to the hooks.

expectations.text: handle-submit: 폼 제출 핸들러가 handleSubmit 등 handle 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: app/login/page.tsx line 21: const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { ... }. The form uses onSubmit={handleSubmit}.

expectations.text: test-files-exist: useLoginForm 또는 useLogin에 대한 테스트 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: No test files for useLoginForm or useLogin exist in features/next-app/. No .test.ts files were found in the hooks directory.
